description: Plugin-distributed hooks for supply-chain-planning. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags supply-chain planning anti-patterns (ungrounded safety-stock numbers, forecasts without accuracy metrics, hard-coded demand figures, just-in-time with no buffer note). Set SUPPLY_CHAIN_PLANNING_STRICT=1 to make it blocking (exit 2).
